name: The Perfect Tuna Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix together cream of mushroom soup and milk in a 1-quart casserole dish.
3. Stir in the tuna, sliced hard-boiled eggs, and peas.
4. Bake for 20 minutes.
5. Sprinkle crumbled potato chips on top.
6. Continue baking for an additional 10 minutes until the topping is lightly browned.
